{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Heiress
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Leah]] is addressed as [[Heiress]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"Valinhall Travelers looking for assignment, Heiress," Indirial said.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
